feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Deceptions
entry.summary:
Author: confused_moron

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 209,136Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 4,047

Summary: During the train journey following his third year, Harry's entire bloody world was turned upside-down. Overwhelmed by some sudden realisations and his bizarre escape from the future, he discovered that those he had believed to be his most loyal allies were the ones poised to inflict the deepest wounds. However, those he had never deemed trustworthy turned out to be the people who would be standing by his side amidst the war. And Harry finally found himself making profound decisions that would forever alter the course of his life...Includes Dark but not evil Harry, some characters Bashing and mental trauma.  "Ohh sssweet Lady, I, the queen of hell, am sssstuck with an innocent child-" the snake exclaimed, causing Harry to pout as he squirmed in the blonde's lap to find a more comfortable position.   "Hey! Not fair! Wait- queen? "   "Yesss hatchling, I am Manassha the queen of hell ssserpentsss, and you sssweet little hatchling, are my counter-"

entry.title: only threw this party for you
entry.summary:
Author: shutupluke

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,441Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: “Come on then, kiss me,” Merlin says, batting his eyelashes exaggeratedly for good measure. “That’s what a good fake boyfriend would do.” “Maybe I’m a bad fake boyfriend,” Arthur responds archly. “No, you’re not,” Merlin says, sensibly, “because then what would be the actual point of making up this stupid lie, and telling Gwen?” Arthur looks up at him, swallows, and Merlin can tell he’s won. “Fine. I’ll kiss you. No promises about how eye-catching it will be.” Merlin grins. “Believe me, every eye in the room will be on us.” Arthur frowns. “That sounds ominous.” “I know,” Merlin says, waggling his eyebrows.   or Merlin is desperately pining for Gwaine, who does not seem to know or care about Merlin's feelings. Incensed on his best friend's behalf, Arthur offers to pretend to be Merlin's boyfriend for the night. Things unfold exactly as you would expect.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 368,658Chapters: 78/110Kudos: 3,482

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: He did not live in Ealdor anymore
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,085Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: When you ask what Magic was to Merlin. It was the way his hoe broke the spring earth without his hands aching by sundown, the way the well-bucket rose at the curl of his fingers. It was a hearth-fire coaxed from damp wood when the cold months grew long. The seam in Will's boot that closed itself. It was the spell Merlin whispered into his own straw mattress, soft, soft, until the ticking grew tender as wool. Back then in Ealdor, Merlin had never thought his magic would kill people. He did not live in Ealdor anymore.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: In the Clearing
entry.summary:
Author: melody_moon

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,483Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 10

Summary: Prince Arthur had seen a lot in his eight summers, the bustle of castle life, the training of new knights, and the bi-annual magical assination attempts against his father. But he's never seen a frog change colour, or a boy with magic that...wasn't evil? Maybe there was more to magic, than what meets the eye...

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,762Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 118

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,531Chapters: 7/13Kudos: 75

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,436Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 4

Summary: By the time Merlin stepped out of the elevator and into the lobby of Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon, he was already regretting every decision that had led him there. Merlin probably should have left the building immediately. Instead, he tightened his grip on the briefcase and headed toward the elevators. Because somewhere between Gaius getting sick and Will making that deal, common sense had apparently abandoned him entirely.

entry.title: Two sides of the same coin
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,457Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 188

Summary: Arthur was born of magic. Merlin was born magic. Merlin was born because of Arthur. Merlin was born FOR Arthur. Everything he'd ever done and will do, was and will be for Arthur. Always.   What happens when Arthur starts to appreciate Merlin and his efforts? What happens, when their emotions run wild and they won't be able to hold them back anymore? What happens when Merlin and Arthur finally give in to their desires and accept their true destiny: to be two sides of the same coin?

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,355Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.summary:
Author: RedPanda25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,976Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 12

Summary: The narration of Arthur's thoughts while he knows that he is dying in the ending of the series. Merlin is there. Has always been there and it is only now that Arthur is dying that he truly realizes how much Merlin has done. And how much Arthur loves Merlin.

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Prophecy of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: HarmonyOfTheSpheres

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,402Chapters: 1/23Kudos: 35

Summary: Merlin is missing, Voldemort has returned, and somehow, Harry has been chosen as a Triwizard champion despite never putting his name in the Goblet of Fire in the first place. Which would all be bad enough as it is, except for the fact that there’s also something terribly wrong with magic. Now Harry must not only find Merlin and stop Voldemort before he can fully rise to power, but also survive in a tournament where each task is becoming increasingly dangerous and magically unstable. As spells start to go awry and Voldemort becomes more desperate than ever, Harry and Arthur must work together to restore magic to the land—before it’s too late.

  • BAMF Merlin (Merlin)
  • Merlin is Emrys (Merlin)

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Time
entry.summary:
Author: HarmonyOfTheSpheres

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,104Chapters: 21/21Kudos: 783

Summary: Merlin has returned to Hogwarts for his second year as the History of Magic professor, and this time he is determined to find a way to destroy the horcrux within Harry before it's too late. It's not exactly a simple task, however, especially with an escaped convict on the loose and dementors lurking around Hogwarts' grounds. So when Merlin finally gets a chance to change Harry's fate, he takes it.A bit of time travel is surely worth the risk if it will save Harry's life—isn't it?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: the ghost come back
entry.summary:
Author: indigotigress7

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,338Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 112

Summary: Twenty-first-century Merlin, tired of waiting for Arthur to return, travels back in time determined to make the best of a second chance in Camelot.(Gaius, still reeling from watching his nephew drink from a poisoned chalice and nearly perish from its effects, is almost too relieved that Merlin has woken up at all to notice how strangely he’s behaving.)(Almost.)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: in sickness and health
entry.summary:
Author: deniigiq

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,765Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 162

Summary: “Are you battling again with the green-eyed monster, sire?” Leon asks.“No," Arthur says.“Are you sure?”“Yes.”“So this is a new method of celebration?”“Yes.”“…are you su—”“Yes, Leon. I’m sure.” (In which Merlin almost gets married and Leon shepherds the fall-out of that to its natural conclusion.)
